query: report-generator not scaling under load, HPA shows unknown metrics

events.message: the HPA was unable to compute the replica count: failed to get cpu utilization: unable to get metrics for resource cpu: no metrics returned from resource metrics API

invalid metrics (1 invalid out of 1), first error is: failed to get cpu resource metric value: failed to get cpu utilization: unable to get metrics for resource cpu: no metrics returned from resource metrics API

symptom: metrics-server pod in kube-system is in CrashLoopBackOff. HPA cannot retrieve resource metrics. Deployment stuck at minReplicas=2 under heavy load.
